arts.ttl: Bournemouth reveal Kerkez price tag - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: Bournemouth reveal Milos Kerkez price, Manchester City interested in Arsenal defender William Saliba and Cristiano Ronaldo's reported move to Inter Milan is not serious.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth at risk of setting unwanted club record in Ipswich meeting
arts.sum: Bournemouth will be looking to avoid an unwanted club record when they welcome Ipsiwch Town to the Vitality Stadium for Wednesday's Premier League fixture.

arts.ttl: Man City issue bleak Erling Haaland injury update on ankle issue sustained at Bournemouth
arts.sum: Erling Haaland suffered an injury to his left ankle as Manchester City beat Bournemouth to reach the semi-finals of the FA Cup on Sunday and faces a lengthy spell on the sidelines

arts.ttl: Man City give injury update on Erling Haaland after the striker left Bournemouth with a protective boot after 2-1 win in the FA Cup
arts.sum: Haaland, who has now recorded 30 goals for three consecutive seasons after scoring in the FA Cup quarter-final win, left the Vitality Stadium with his foot in a protective boot.
